summary: Problem 1.6 asks for the exact value of the smallest constant $\alpha$ governing the genus-dependent term in the edge-density bound for $Z_3$-flow-critical graphs; the paper itself establishes $1 \leq \alpha \leq 5/2$ via Theorem 1.5 and the extremal example $K^+_{3,n-3}$. No subsequent paper resolving or substantially narrowing this range was found in the indexed literature through May 2026. The problem remains open.

notes: No follow-up paper addressing Problem 1.6 found after exhausting 5 web calls. The source paper was published in SIAM J. Discrete Math. 37 (2023), 699-717, so it is well-indexed; absence of follow-up evidence supports open status with high confidence.
